summary: Hi, my name is Greet. I am 78 years old and I live alone in Utrecht. My daughter Marieke is most important to me. I valu
When I get washed it helps if someone hums the Wilhelmus. And I always want my cup of tea before breakfast — never after
The most important thing for me is that I want to stay in my own home. I am afraid of being moved to a nursing home.
Mum calls the dog 'Henk' — that was actually her father's name. If you call the dog by its real name she gets confused.
Greet flinches when approached from the right side. We always announce ourselves and approach from the left.
If something serious happens I do not want aggressive treatment in hospital. I would rather be at home, comfortable, wit
